title: kedrostis hirta
intro: Kedrostis hirta, also known as the hairy vine or bush, is a plant species in the family Cucurbitaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Kedrostis hirta include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are made by steeping the plant's leaves, stems, or roots in hot water.
